---
title: "intent.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/routes/api/intent.ts"
loc: 42
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.38
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 4.86
overall_score: 4.95
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[POST] /intent`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FastifyInstance](file://fastify)
- [Type](file://@sinclair/typebox)
- [Static](file://@sinclair/typebox)

### Exports
- `IntentSchema`
- `fastify`
- `fastify`
- `router`
